chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1493 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.6893/2024 (Exemption) 2. For order on Misc. No.6894/2024 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 20.10.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This case was filed on 25.3.2024, which is over eighteen months ago. None has ever appeared for the petitioner in this case in the last eighteen months. Learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this case diligently in the last eighteen months. Again none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
